description_long: This is a futuristic, science-fiction inspired airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and four prominent engines mounted on the wings. The wings are straight and extend outward with slight upward angles, each featuring laser cannon-like protrusions at the tips. The body is primarily metallic gray with red and blue markings, giving it a battle-worn, utilitarian appearance. The cockpit is forward-mounted and enclosed with a transparent canopy, suggesting a single-pilot configuration. The tail section is compact with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The overall design is reminiscent of advanced fighter aircraft, optimized for agility and speed.
description: A sleek, metallic gray sci-fi airplane with four engines, straight wings, and a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit, featuring red and blue markings and a compact tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the four engines, forward cockpit canopy, and laser cannon-like wingtip extensions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, straight wings, and visible engine details.
description_view_2: Rear oblique view emphasizing the engine exhausts, wing structure, and tail assembly.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and engine arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight wings, slight upward dihedral, and wingtip extensions resembling laser cannons.
attribute_engine_type: Four visible jet engines mounted in pairs on each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear, with two main gear units and one nose gear (implied by design, not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy.
